module-4-customer-cleanup-project.label: Module 4 Customer Cleanup Project
module-4-customer-cleanup-project.summary: Build a customer cleanup worksheet with text, list, and NULL checks.

mp-1-find-missing-emails.title: Find the missing email records
mp-1-find-missing-emails.prompt: Start the cleanup report by returning `id`, `full_name`, and `email` from `customers` where `email` is NULL.
mp-1-find-missing-emails.hint: Switch the NULL check so it keeps the missing values.

help.concept: Cleanup queries often start by isolating the rows that are missing required information.
help.hint_2: Run the query and confirm the results table shows only customers without email values.

mp-1-find-missing-emails.starterCode:
-- Start the cleanup report by finding missing emails.
SELECT
  id,
  full_name,
  email
FROM customers
WHERE email IS NOT NULL;

mp-2-keep-real-follow-ups.title: Keep the real follow-up statuses
mp-2-keep-real-follow-ups.prompt: Add `status` to the result, and keep only customers whose status is `active` or `draft`.
mp-2-keep-real-follow-ups.hint: Use IN to keep the two allowed statuses.

help.concept: Each new rule should make the cleanup list more useful.
help.hint_2: Add `status` to the SELECT list and `status IN ('active', 'draft')` to the WHERE clause.

mp-2-keep-real-follow-ups.starterCode:
SELECT
  id,
  full_name,
  email
FROM customers
WHERE email IS NULL;

-- Keep the missing-email rule above.
-- Only keep active or draft customers.

mp-3-finish-cleanup-report.title: Finish the cleanup report
mp-3-finish-cleanup-report.prompt: Add `city` to the result, exclude test rows, and keep only customers whose city starts with `Chi`.
mp-3-finish-cleanup-report.hint: You need one more selected column and two more conditions.

help.concept: The last step combines several real-world cleanup checks in one query.
help.hint_2: Use `city LIKE 'Chi%'` and `is_test = 0` while keeping the earlier conditions.

mp-3-finish-cleanup-report.starterCode:
SELECT
  id,
  full_name,
  email,
  status
FROM customers
WHERE email IS NULL
  AND status IN ('active', 'draft');

-- Keep the filters above.
-- Add city, exclude test rows, and keep only cities that start with Chi.

sketch_project_brief.title: Project brief
sketch_project_brief.bodyMarkdown:
A teammate is preparing a cleanup pass on customer records and needs a short follow-up worksheet.

Start by finding the obvious gaps, then narrow the list until it highlights the records that still need attention.

The finished report should focus on real customer rows, not test data.
